prompt: Develop a local arithmetic drill module for children ages 5-8 with timed or untimed questions, feedback, streak tracking, and difficulty controls.
Create a preschool color-identification quiz where children choose the correct color from simple multiple-choice options.
Build an interactive lesson that helps learners understand how Archimedes approximated pi using inscribed and circumscribed polygons.
Create a personal citation manager with local storage, import/export, bibliography generation, and print-friendly reference lists.
Build a local spell-check module that scans text against bundled and custom dictionaries, suggests corrections, and flags unknown words for review.
Create a tablature practice player that loads guitar tab files, supports slower playback, looping, and visual follow-along.
Build a bilingual agricultural machinery glossary with term pairs, pronunciation, diagrams, and offline lookup.
Create a self-paced Esperanto course with progressive lessons, pronunciation help, a grammar reference, and local progress tracking.
Generate multiplication worksheets with configurable ranges and a matching answer key for classroom use.
Build a local spaced-repetition flashcard app for language vocabulary with deck management, review scheduling, and progress statistics.
Create a kanji lookup reference that supports radical search, stroke count, and saved study lists.
Build a patient education reference module about Lyme disease with prevention guidance, symptoms, diagnosis, and treatment information.
Create a vocabulary study module with flashcards, audio pronunciation, quiz mode, and spaced repetition.
Build an animal-classification quiz for elementary students with immediate feedback and local score tracking.
Create an adaptive multiplication fact trainer with timed practice, instant feedback, and local progress tracking.
Build a microbiology practice module for identifying GI organisms from selective agar growth patterns.
Create a local gradebook where teachers manage rosters, assignments, weighted grades, comments, and printable report cards.
Build a geography quiz module that presents place-based questions and gives immediate feedback.
Generate printable vocabulary bingo cards from a teacher-provided word list.
Create a personal reference database for vocabulary, quotes, notes, or contacts with full-text search and tag filtering.
Build a Klingon dictionary and transliteration reference with lookup, conversion tools, and favorite terms for review.
Create a fast arithmetic speed-drill module with configurable operations, instant feedback, and local score history.
Build a fraction-to-visual matching drill that shows a written fraction and asks the learner to pick the correct visual model.
Create an offline FCC Technician exam study module with the full question pool, quiz sessions, explanations, and mastery tracking.
Build an interactive grammar module that teaches the parts of speech with mini-lessons, examples, and short quizzes.
Create a local haiku generator that uses editable word banks with syllable counts and keeps a history of generated poems.
Build an offline map-labeling tool for Latin America where learners drag place labels onto the correct map positions.
Create a drill where the learner fills in a missing denominator to make two fractions equivalent.
Build a chemistry study tool for learning common ions, charges, and formula patterns.
Create a worksheet builder that lets teachers generate printable practice sheets with answer keys.
Build a French conjugation trainer with quick lookup, practice prompts, and corrective feedback.
Create a local reference and quiz module about the planets, with fact cards and comparison views.
Build a scripture memorization drill for a fixed assigned verse set with progress tracking and review of missed verses.
Create a Tamil alphabet learning module with letter presentation, pronunciation, and drill exercises.
Build a grammar and style practice module with instant feedback, topic tracking, and recommendations for what to study next.
Create a phonics practice module for early readers with sound patterns, repetition, and immediate feedback.
Build a literary-terms study guide with definitions, examples, and short self-test questions.
Create a chemistry formula calculator that computes molar mass from a chemical formula and shows the element-by-element breakdown.
Build a letter-formation learning tool for children with animated stroke demonstrations and tracing practice.
Create a word-search puzzle generator for children that uses custom vocabulary lists and progressive difficulty.
Build a Russian vocabulary drill where items are shown one at a time and progress is tracked per card.
Create a beginner French lesson with alphabet presentation, pronunciation, and simple reading exercises.
Build an interactive periodic table with search, category color coding, and a detail panel for element properties.
Create a Europe geography study module with learn mode, quiz mode, and reference lookup for countries, capitals, and flags.
Build a focused US state geography labeling practice module with hints, immediate feedback, and local progress tracking.
Create a technical writing style training module with rule explanations, interactive exercises, and a quick-reference card.
